title: Payment API returns HTTP 500
description: Customers cannot complete payments. The checkout service returns HTTP 500 errors during payment processing.

title: Database connection timeout
description: Order Service cannot establish a connection to the MySQL database due to repeated timeout errors.

title: Users unable to log in
description: Users receive 'Invalid Token' errors when attempting to authenticate using Single Sign-On.

title: VPN connectivity failure
description: Remote employees cannot connect to the corporate VPN after the latest network update.

title: High CPU usage on production server
description: Production application server is running above 95% CPU utilization, causing slow response times.

title: Suspicious login attempts detected
description: Multiple failed login attempts from unknown IP addresses were detected across several user accounts.

title: Cloud storage bucket unavailable
description: Application cannot access cloud object storage due to permission errors.

title: Email notifications not delivered
description: Transactional emails are not reaching customers after successful order confirmation.

title: DNS resolution failure
description: Internal services cannot resolve hostnames, resulting in application communication failures.

title: Application configuration error
description: Application failed to start after deployment because of an invalid configuration parameter.
